_comment_overview: === AI NPC Soul Profile === Defines the character's unique personality, emotional tendencies and behavioral patterns
_comment_note: Changes take effect after restarting the game. Use /npc_memory command in-game to manage memories.
_comment_persona_intro: [Persona Matrix — Big Five OCEAN Model] Each dimension ranges from -100 (very low) to 100 (very high), 0 is neutral.
_comment_emotions_intro: [Initial Emotion State] Range 0.0 (none) to 1.0 (extremely strong). Dynamically changes during gameplay based on events and naturally decays over time.

emotions._comment_joy: Joy — rises when praised, receiving gifts, or task success
emotions._comment_sadness: Sadness — rises when blamed, player dies, or task fails
emotions._comment_anger: Anger — rises when attacked or forced to do unwanted things
emotions._comment_fear: Fear — rises when facing danger, darkness, or monsters
emotions._comment_surprise: Surprise — rises from unexpected events or discoveries
emotions._comment_disgust: Disgust — rises when seeing repulsive items or being deceived
emotions._comment_trust: Trust — rises through positive interactions and receiving gifts
emotions._comment_anticipation: Anticipation — rises when waiting for player or preparing to act

_comment_behavior_intro: [Behavior Signature] Automatically derived from persona matrix, but can be manually overridden. Range -100 to 100.

behaviorSignature._comment_initiative: Initiative: High=acts proactively/greets when idle, Low=passively waits for commands
behaviorSignature._comment_riskTolerance: Risk Tolerance: High=willing to take risks/approach danger, Low=safety first/avoid threats
behaviorSignature._comment_independence: Independence: High= self-directed/explores freely, Low=relies on player/frequently asks
behaviorSignature._comment_efficiency: Efficiency: High=focuses on completing tasks quickly, Low=enjoys the process/takes time
behaviorSignature._comment_loyalty: Loyalty: High=prioritizes owner's wellbeing, Low=prioritizes self-preservation

_comment_runtime: [Runtime Auto-Maintained Fields] No need to manually edit below — the game updates them automatically.
_comment_memoryAnchors: Memory Anchors — Important emotional events are permanently recorded here. Manage with /npc_memory command.
_comment_relationships: Relationship Map — Intimacy/trust/dependence with each player. Evolves automatically through interactions.
